---
name: Change request
about: Request a dashboard, alerting, or observability-governance change
title: '[Change] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the requested change.

## Why this is needed

Explain the problem, constraint, or opportunity.

## Scope

- [ ] Dashboard change
- [ ] Alerting change
- [ ] Validation workflow change
- [ ] Documentation change

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Affected services or environments are identified
- [ ] Validation impact is explicit
- [ ] Operational ownership is explicit
- [ ] Documentation updates in English are identified

## Notes

Add monitoring, alerting, or follow-up details here.
